data.title: Kevin O'Leary Blasts Tim Walz's Dig At Tesla Stock — He's Mocking A Company His Own Pension Fund Invests In
data.description: Kevin O'Leary slammed Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz for mocking Tesla's falling stock price given the state's pension fund holds 1.6 million shares in the company.

data.title: Perplexity Can Make 'Apple Intelligence Work' Says CEO Aravind Srinivas As iPhone Maker Attracts Criticism On Siri And AI Delays
data.description: Perplexity AI CEO Aravind Srinivas said on Thursday that "Perplexity will make Apple Intelligence work," responding to a social media post suggesting the artificial intelligence startup should replace Siri on iPhones.

data.title: Eminem's Unreleased Music Allegedly Sold Online By Ex-Sound Engineer For $50,000 In Bitcoin
data.description: A former sound engineer for Grammy award-winning rapper Eminem has been accused of leaking and selling the artist’s unreleased music for thousands in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC).

data.title: Elon Musk Says 'Hang On To Your Stock' In Surprise Late-Evening Tesla All-Hands Meeting — Touts 7 Million EVs, Optimus Robot, And AI Supercomputer Dojo
data.description: Elon Musk surprised Tesla employees with a late-night all-hands meeting, unveiling major milestones, AI and robotics updates—including Optimus and Dojo—and urging staff and investors to stay the course despite recent volatility and confusion surrounding the event.

data.title: Elon Musk's New X Post Sends Kekius Maximus Soaring 75%—Frog-Themed Pepe Also Rallies
data.description: Kekius Maximus (KEKIUS) meme coin woke up from slumber, skyrocketing over 70% Thursday, after tech mogul Elon Musk posted a photo referencing the cartoon character.
